title: The Me I Want Them to See

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Snap!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...So, how does it looky-look?
choice_data_list: Well, it turned out like this...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Pffft. What's up with my face?! I look super
serious!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin came to me saying that she wants to
send her family a photo of herself wearing her
signature racewear, so I'm helping her take the
picture.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hmm. It is a funny picture, though! Still, that's not
quite what I'm looking for...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, can we go again? They've been asking to
see a photo, so I'd like to make it a good one...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, thankies! Okay, for the next one...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Let's try this!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Or maybe... this!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: And if that doesn't work... get a load of this!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... We've snapped a bunch of pictures, but
none of them are clicking with me...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We browse through all the photos together, but I
have to agree...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... So we want a shot of me in my signature
racewear, right? One that says, "Look, I'm really
running!"

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Dad, Mom, my sisters... It's thanks to their
support that I'm here.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: When they saw how much I loved running, they cheered me on every step of the way... So the thing I really want to show them would be...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: That's it! I've got it! Trainer, let's go to the track!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Get ready, Trainer, I'm going to run at my very best! My family gave me the push I needed to sprint towards my dreams—and that's what I want to show them!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
No retakes. We've got one shot here, so make it
perfect! I'm counting on you!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Okay, it's in your hands!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Rrraaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin shoots down the track as if she's racing
for real. Though I briefly fumble with the camera,
I quickly lock my eyes on to her figure and take
the shot.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Snap!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Phew! Did you get a good one?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Fully confident, I show her the picture I took...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Oh... Ahaha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It shows Ines Fujin running as passionately as she
does in real races, and with sharp eyes locked
straight ahead. She looks cool, and is clearly
enjoying the moment.
choice_data_list: Now this is how you were meant to flaunt that racewear!
Now this is how you were meant to flaunt that racewear!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... That's what was missing! What an
awesome photo!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for all your help with this! Hehe. Okay,
time to send this to my folks!
choice_data_list: We really got the perfect shot!
We really got the perfect shot!
Why not send all the photos we took?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Why not send all the photos we took?
choice_data_list: We really got the perfect shot!
We really got the perfect shot!
Why not send all the photos we took?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I just know they'll love it! Aaand... send.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Okay, now to get changed and train!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...Wow, my mom's already replied! Let's see...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
"Thanks for the photo! It's a relief to see you all
energized and having so much fun."

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
"Your sisters love how cool you look. They've
even made this photo their lock screen." Nice!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...I guess you really are the best at capturing me
in the moment, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin is absolutely thrilled. It looks like this
signature racewear photo shoot has been a great
experience!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
What?! We can't! There are a few weird ones in
there!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Like, there's one where... See, look! I'm making a
heart with my hands in this one, and I've got this
smug face here! And there are others, too!
choice_data_list: None of them are as bad as you say...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: They are bad! I have a "dependable older sister" image to maintain, you know...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Okay, this stuff's staying between us, Trainer! I've
got to sort these into folders later.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
And now to get changed for training! I've got to
work hard if I want to look cool in real races, too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin dashes off confidently. As she does, I
think about how I'll need to keep supporting her
so she can continue to run in style.
